3 #define LAW_CONTRIBUTION_VARIABLE_H
4 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 13 08:40:09 2012
5  * Generated by createNew
6  */
7 
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/Variable.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/VariableRef.h"
10 
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Contribution/Variable/Variable.h"
12 
13 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 
16 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
17 BEGIN_AUDI_NAMESPACE
18 
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 
22 template<typename K>
23 class Variable
24 : public Law::VariableT< Law::VariableRefT<Law::ScalarRealProperty,K> >
25 , public ArcNum::audi::Variable<K>
26 {
27 public:
28 
29  typedef typename Law::VariableRefT<Law::ScalarRealProperty,K> Ref;
30  typedef typename Law::VariableT< Ref > Base;
31  typedef typename Base::DerivativesReturnType DerivType;
32 
33  typedef ArcNum::audi::Variable<K> AuDiBase ;
34 
35  Variable() {}
36 
37  Variable(const Variable& rhs)
38  : Base(rhs)
39  , AuDiBase(rhs) {}
40 
41  Variable(const Law::BuildInfo<Law::ScalarRealProperty>& bi)
42  : Base(bi.property(), bi.offsets(), bi.variableMng().template variables<K>())
43  , AuDiBase(bi.offsets().constView())
44  {
45  auto const& property = bi.property() ;
46  auto const& accessor = bi.variableMng().template variables<K>() ;
47  AuDiBase::setValues(&(accessor.values(property))) ;
48  if(accessor.hasDerivatives(property))
49  AuDiBase::setDerivValues(&(accessor.derivatives(property))) ;
50  }
51 
52  virtual ~Variable() {}
53 
54 public:
55 
56  inline const ArcNum::RootContribution& operator[](const K& item) const
57  {
58  return AuDiBase::operator[](item) ;
59  }
60 
61 
62  inline const ArcNum::RootContribution& operator[](const Arcane::ItemEnumeratorT<K>& iter) const
63  {
64  return AuDiBase::operator[](iter) ;
65  }
66 
67  inline const ArcNum::RootContribution& operator[](const ArcNum::Stencil::ItemT<K>& item) const
68  {
69  return AuDiBase::operator[](item) ;
70  }
71 
72 };
73 
74 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
75 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
76 
77 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
78 END_AUDI_NAMESPACE
79 
80 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
81 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
82 
83 #endif /* LAW_CONTRIBUTION_VARIABLE_H */
